programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Eep and the others try to intervene with Thunk and Blurg's first date, they decide to run away so they can live happily ever after; Snoot and Ugga race each other to get to the Doomsday Skunkguin but are forced to put their differences aside once the weirder animals come out to hunt them down

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Eep is kicked out of Thunk's new imaginary role-playing adventure game she decides to play her own, real version of the game; Fed up with Squawk's mean teaching style, Eep has Grug fire him and replace him with Rad, the quintessential young, cool teacher

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Tired of settling disputes between Valleyites, Grug invents “Chance,” a two-sided rock that can be flipped to determine all decisions in the Valley; In a nature documentary-style, Thunk tells the story of Beary, a peaceful Thunk-like cub that struggles to fit into a violent bear owl culture

programme.desc: Under the burning sun of Cape Cross, large colonies of seals gather on Namibia's Skeleton Coast...The males, who can weigh up to 360 kg, patrol the territory to protect their females and young. But new predators are coming from the land, forcing them to learn new defense behaviors.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the heart of the Valdees Peninsula, in Patagonia, whales are regularly hunted by a predator whose diminutive size hides its gruesome intentions: the seagull, forcing whales to dive deep into the depths, away from essential oxygen and light.

programme.title: Islands of Creation
programme.desc: In the jungles of a remote archipelago in the South Pacific, a biologist is attempting to do something Charles Darwin and Ernst Mayr never accomplished: catch evolution in the act of creating new species. Albert Uy is on the verge of an amazing discovery in the Solomon Islands, but there's a threat looming on the horizon.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: In this episode we meet some animal elders who help us understand the psychological mechanisms associated with long life and the positive social value long-lived animals bring to their communities.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: Meet some late-life lovers and explore the reasons behind their sexual longevity and their ability to reproduce well into their later years.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: What does it take to maintain alpha status as animals grow older? We investigate the responsibilities and challenges that come with being a senior leader of a pack.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: We explore the integral role that older animals play in their communities and investigate how animals learn over the course of their lives.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: Human, plant, animal, bacteria, all have one inevitable thing in common; death. In this episode we discover the ways in which aging animals defy our usual understanding of the circle of life.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Turtleneck wants to crack the Stinkless Serum formula and makes it a competition, pitting worker babies against worker babies, stating that the first one to the Serum will be the new CEO!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Krupp's campers take on rich rivals in a hoity-toity boat race that also features a revenge-obsessed giant salamander. Paging Captain Underpants!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: The campers' splat-tastic game of paintball is rather rudely interrupted by a foul and formidable fiend known only as Camoflush.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Jun forms an unlikely connection with Sledkin.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Eugene’s bond with Webmaster is put to the test when Webmaster leaves the group for a pack of Deathgrippers.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom sets out to prove Sledkin caused an explosion that injured a dragon in the Hidden World.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Lerk and Thunk hide all the valley's worms in a cave to protect them from the hunters who want to use them as bait; Grug invents the spear and pitches it to the Valley as a tool that will change cavemanity forever!

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep, Thunk, Lerk, and Womp set out to make it to the end of “The Tunnel of Terror” within the Cave of Secrets; After being rescued by a mysterious creature at the watering hole, Thunk tries to convince the Valley that a “sea thing” exists and it's not just his imagination

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Grug wakes up without a voice, he and Ugga go on the hunt to find his voice, while Eep, Thunk, and Gran stay behind. But when the Valleyites come to Eep with questions for Grug, she takes this opportunity to be a leader by pretending to have a conversation with Grug in their cave

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Eep and the others try to intervene with Thunk and Blurg's first date, they decide to run away so they can live happily ever after; Snoot and Ugga race each other to get to the Doomsday Skunkguin but are forced to put their differences aside once the weirder animals come out to hunt them down

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Eep is kicked out of Thunk's new imaginary role-playing adventure game she decides to play her own, real version of the game; Fed up with Squawk's mean teaching style, Eep has Grug fire him and replace him with Rad, the quintessential young, cool teacher

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Tired of settling disputes between Valleyites, Grug invents “Chance,” a two-sided rock that can be flipped to determine all decisions in the Valley; In a nature documentary-style, Thunk tells the story of Beary, a peaceful Thunk-like cub that struggles to fit into a violent bear owl culture

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: During a camping trip Jim gives Lucky and the girls a treasure map that sends them on the adventure of a lifetime

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky Spirit and Turo team up to help save an abused horse

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When a sudden blizzard hits Miradero, Lucky and Maricela must work together to save the town.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Grayson wrangles Spirit "fair and square" and sends him to auction in another town --and there is nothing Lucky can do to stop him!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Spirit and Lucky desperately try to find a way back to one another.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: The girl’s plans to attend the Governor’s Ball are waylaid when they save a pregnant horse.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Skidmark and White Shadow try to stop spring from coming by keeping a groundhog in his hole; Smoove loses the power behind his effortless cool.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: The FAST crew's vacation is threatened by hard-partying toilet frogs. The Crew quits racing when they become obsessed with a fantasy racing league.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald accidentally volunteers a rag-tag group of Crackridge locals in an important game of Crackarack against Saddlerock. / When Mayor Fowler is away for the day, Archibald assumes Brock is now the Mayor of Crackridge.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald can’t wait to celebrate his Hatch Day with his family inside an impossibly fun theme park. But when Archibald accidentally gets sprayed by a skunk, he must try to get rid of his stank before his special day is ruined. / When Archibald overhears something suspicious about a neighbor, he reports it to his aunts who run the Neighborhood Bird Watch. With Archibald as their new recruit, they attempt to expose the neighbor’s suspicious shenanigans.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Determined to save her family home, Lucky signs up to race as a wild card in Rosemead's elite Junior Cup. But winning it all won't be easy.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: A new leader of Voltron must be found before Lotor's forces attack.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. The Zenkos swing into action to send customers her way. / When Donna, Fawna and Rona have a spat, the triplets’ longstanding annual tradition of viewing a comet together is in jeopardy. Now it’s up to Team Zenko to get the three feuding sisters back together again before the comet streaks by.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Motato temps Larry to goof off on their new job at Pa Grape's store/Captain Mike and Mr. Pea compete to get Junior and Tiny Pea the best pet ever

programme.title: Vantara: Sanctuary Stories (S1)
programme.desc: At Vantara, Forrest witnesses King Cheetah race freely across a stadium-sized field. He marvels as an Orangutan enjoys cake, and nature shows to celebrate his birthday.

programme.title: The Animals' Guide to Survival (S1)
programme.desc: Find out how marsh harriers lose their hunting grounds under salt water and how Florida’s Key Deer are threatened by rising sea levels.

programme.title: Strategy of Life (S1)
programme.desc: The way animals mate is fascinating. The antechinus, an indigenous Australian marsupial, risks everything during a one-week period of mating, and eventually dies bravely.

programme.title: Ocean Wild (S1)
programme.desc: In Thailand, marine life is like none other.Discover how these creatures have developed complex systems to evade predators, catch prey, reproduce, and live healthy lives.

programme.title: Weird, Wild And Wonderful (S1)
programme.desc: In WEIRD, WILD & WONDERFUL we travel through Africa to explore and explain why the natural world looks the way it does.

programme.title: Dogs 101 (S2)
programme.desc: Meet the Bernese Mountain Dog, Afghan, Portugese Water Dog, Cairn Terrier, and Alaskan Malamute.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society’s conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian, in order to seek evidence against his gang. After their release from jail, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, just as Shan successfully cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Burning Blood
programme.desc: Narcotics squad members—Tai Hua, Lao Mi, Ah Feng, and Ah Tang—are involved in arresting a drug lord. However, a betrayal within the police leads to the deaths of Ah Feng and his superior, while Ah Tang vanishes. As Tai Hua and Lao Mi uncover the truth, they find themselves torn between loyalty and betrayal in their fight against the drug cartel.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and “dirty pasta”.

programme.title: La French Touch
programme.desc: Sébastien Martin and his friend Chef François Audrin travel through Kochi Prefecture, visiting local farms and wineries, discovering inspiration from the producers' commitment and unique food culture.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard and his team try to make the grade when they partner with Bre, a college professor and aspiring flipper, to revive a rundown farmhouse in his old neighbourhood.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: Got to Leave Something
programme.desc: The two adventurers follow the mountaineer deep into the remote areas of Jiri Mountain. They experience a feast with makgeolli (Korean rice wine) and local mountain folk.

programme.title: Mama's Little Murderer
programme.desc: Devoted single mother Constance struggles to balance her newfound love with Leo and the obsessive, destructive behaviour of her son, Anthony, who will go to extreme lengths to keep her to himself.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: The Killer Inside: The Ruth Finley Story
programme.desc: Ruth and her husband Ed's tranquil life in Wichita, Kansas is suddenly turned upside down when Ed suffers a heart attack. While Ed is in the hospital, Ruth's starts to receive mysterious threats.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: The competitive pinball-wizard Wolfe brothers meet coin-op king Dirk at his giant poultry barn turned private arcade. Mike and Robbie enter a hangar full of ultra-rare games and choice carnival relics.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S15)
programme.desc: Around the world and throughout history, people have reported seeing very similar types of unidentified objects in the sky. Now, Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten alien craft.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: She was the last pharaoh of Egypt and one of the most famous queens of all time, but her death in 31 B.C. has been shrouded in mystery. Cleopatra's body has been lost without a trace for over 2,000 years.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: In September 1939, enabled by a secret pact between Adolf Hitler and Josef Stalin, Germany invades Poland with its lightning style of tank warfare, plunging Europe back into war.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: After defeating Poland, Hitler looks west, planning an attack into France that will take advantage of a weak point in their defences. British Prime Minister Churchill scrambles to evacuate Allied troops.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S2)
programme.desc: A car salesman has the visionary idea to start the first rental car company in America, and when he joins forces with cab company owner John Hertz, they spread their business across the country.

programme.title: History's Deadliest with Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: From epic ancient battles at Cannae and Agincourt to World War II’s Battle of the Bulge and the Battle of Stalingrad, these are history’s deadliest conflicts.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: Mike and Jersey Jon hone in on some big-money picks in North Carolina while Danielle and Robbie meet a legendary bluegrass fiddler with an awesome Nashville collection.

programme.title: Ip Man- The Final Fight
programme.desc: The movie portrays the later life of grandmaster Ip Man in Hong Kong, including his romantic relationship with a singer after his wife died, much to his students’ opposition; his relationship with his eldest son who is also his student; and finally, his reunion with disciple Bruce Lee after the latter becomes an international superstar.

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: Tales from the Occult
programme.desc: The movie consists of three tales about the horrors lurking in dark corners of the city. A young pop star goes back into depression when spooky things happen in her new home; an online influencer performs live in a mall, but it ends up being a livestream of his death; the residents of a tenement building battle a mysterious figure in the stairwell.

programme.title: The Brotherhood of Rebel
programme.desc: Chai, a triad member, helps his childhood friend Meow flee Hong Kong after discovering that Meow attempted to kill his triad boss. 17 years later, Chai becomes a key member of the triad. When he runs into Meow one day, he knows that his gang will kill Meow if they find him. Caught between triad and brotherhood, what will Chai choose?

programme.title: The Chinese Boxer
programme.desc: A Japanese karate master and Diao Er, who has been expelled from his martial arts school, return to the school to kill the school master and his disciples. After the massacre, disciple Lei Ming embarks on a vigorous training regime and vows to avenge their deaths. A fatal battle is about to begin…

programme.title: The Flying Guillotine
programme.desc: Ma Teng is an assassin of the ‘Flying Guillotine Squad’, a group of killers commissioned by the Emperor Yung. When Ma starts to question the morality of his missions, he finds himself becoming a fugitive hunted by his former comrades.

programme.title: Mauna Ka... Susunod Ako!
programme.desc: When Gerry's father Eric dies in the hands of criminal elements, he goes to his father's bestfriend Arthur for guidance.

programme.title: The Flor Contemplacion Story (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: The tragic tale of the Filipino maid hanged for the murder in Singapore in 1995 not only called the attention to the plight of overseas workers everywhere in the world but also resulted in one of the most acclaimed films in Philippine motion picture history.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: NHK World Selection
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programs from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-9.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Most commercial honey in Japan comes from Western honeybees, whose honey can be harvested several times a year. Japanese honeybees are much less productive but keeping them can be a real education.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: A local cat guides us to a fairy tale palace-or rather, a shrine that looks like the palace! Together with Iwago, we visit scenic spots, including a tea farm that's patrolled by an early-rising cat.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: #2 Banana-Slip Physics
programme.desc: Slip on banana peel, take a tumble: the classic comedy gag! Mabuchi Kiyoshi's serious search for scientific proof of that slipperiness revealed that peels have properties similar to human body parts!

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: The changing leaves, the transient beauty of the ancient capital in fall. Dive deep into Kyoto, still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Asking a shop manager to follow orders from head office. Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical, effective workplace expressions and understand business culture.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Kojima Sachiyo runs a different sort of bar. Customers make small items out of scrap material. Finding new appreciation for things once seen as disposable, all while enjoying a drink with friends.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Fading Homeland
programme.desc: As battles with Russia persist in an eastern Ukrainian town, electricity is vital. Through power grid workers risking their lives to fix the grid, we depict people losing their homeland to war.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: NHK World TV Special Program
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programs from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Anime Manga Explosion
programme.desc: We spotlight Sound! Euphonium, a coming-of-age band drama. Novelist Takeda Ayano recalls her real high-school band days and Kyoto Animation showcases Uji's scenery and hand-drawn performance scenes.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Seeing the baby laugh when tickled, Mee thinks everyone likes tickles and happily tickles every child in sight. But Mee's friend Hee suddenly gets angry and says, "Stop it! Don't tickle me!"

programme.title: Design Ah Neo: Ears
programme.desc: Design is fun! Design feels good! Cutting-edge images and music guide children to enjoy exploring the ideas and tweaks in the designs all around us. An episode on Ears.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: The British city of Oxford is home to the renowned University of Oxford. The city's 900-year academic history shapes its streets with rich traditions, historic colleges, and a unique scholarly spirit.

programme.title: Cry Macho
programme.desc: A former rodeo star and washed-up horse breeder goes on a redemptive journey to Mexico to retrieve his ex-boss' son in this moving drama.

programme.title: Justice League (2017)
programme.desc: Fueled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of his newfound ally, Diana Prince, to face an even greater enemy. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to find and recruit a team of metahumans to stand against this newly awakened threat. But despite the formation of this unprecedented league of heroes – Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and The Flash – it may already be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: Acclaimed filmmaker Guillermo del Toro (Pan's Labyrinth) brings out the big guns in this sci-fi action epic about a ragtag band of humans that band together in the year 2025 to fight legions of monstrous creatures rising from the sea. Using massive piloted robots to combat the alien threat, earth's survivors (including Charlie Hunnam, Charlie Day & Rinko Kikuchi) take the fight to the invading alien force lurking in the depths of the Pacific Ocean. Nearly defenseless in the face of the relentless enemy, the forces of mankind have no choice but to turn to two unlikely heroes -- a washed up former pilot and an untested trainee -- who now stand as earth's final hope against the mounting apocalypse.

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer
programme.desc: Bryan Singer supersizes the "Jack and the Beanstalk" legend in this epic action twist on a classic tale, starring Nicholas Hoult, Stanley Tucci, Bill Nighy, Ewan McGregor, Ian McShane and more. When a young farmhand unwittingly opens a gateway between our world and a fearsome race of giants, an ancient war is reignited. Unleashed upon the Earth, the marauding giants strive to reclaim the land they once lost, forcing Jack into the battle of his life to stop them. Fighting for a kingdom and its people -- and the love of a princess, of course -- he comes face to face with the legendary goliaths and, in the process, become a legend himself.

programme.title: Friends S7 22
programme.desc: Chandler confronts his estranged cross-dressing father (KATHLEEN TURNER). Rachel gets into trouble driving Monica's Porsche.

programme.title: Friends S7 23
programme.desc: As the relatives gather for Monica and Chandler's wedding, Chandler finally realizes the magnitude of what he's doing. Joey finds out that he must choose between a major film role and attending the nuptials.

programme.title: Friends S7 24
programme.desc: Monica remains blissfully unaware of the potential disasters on her wedding day.

programme.desc: When a magazine incorrectly credits Sheldon as the lead scientist of the paper he co-wrote with Sheldon, things get awkward.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 15
programme.desc: Jane and Rigsby race to save Van Pelt from the killer who is hunting former CBI members, but it will take all of Jane's skills to locate her before it's too late.

programme.desc: Jane enlists his colleagues in a dangerous ruse to trap a team of art thieves. Meanwhile, sparks fly between Lisbon and an agent from the FBI's art squad.

programme.title: FBI (Season 8)
programme.desc: After a young man is found beaten to death on federal land, Scola and Special Agent Eva Ramos (new series regular Juliana Aidén Martinez) hit a roadblock when their case intersects with a DEA operation.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: The Rainmaker (Season 1)
programme.desc: Worried about Melvin’s threat, Rudy defies Bruiser and risks his job and future as Dot’s attorney.

programme.title: CIA (Season 1)
programme.desc: When a deeply embedded U.S. intelligence officer is detained in Hong Kong, Nikki insists on traveling there to bring him home. But when her cover is blown, the team must work tirelessly to get her back to New York.

programme.title: Ambulance (2022)
programme.desc: In this action thriller directed by Michael Bay, desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiraling into the most insane escape LA has ever seen.

This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Dr Ann's Secret Lives - Turtles
programme.desc: Dr Ann Jones heads to Rosemary Island, WA to join turtle scientists on their annual nest survey. It's hot work, but worth it - females laying eggs; flatback hatchlings, and she even wrestles a Green Turtle.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 2
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: ABC Late News Weekend - Episode 44
programme.desc: When you need to know what's happening turn to ABC News for coverage you can trust. Meredith Sheehan brings you the day's news by reporters in more locations across Australia, connecting communities and telling your stories.

programme.title: Offsiders - Episode 17
programme.desc: More than just the action on the field, Offsiders tackles the week in sport from all angles - from business, politics, marketing, the fans, society, culture, history and the athletes' perspective. Presented by Abbey Gelmi.

programme.title: Audra's Eat, Roam, Relish - Episode 1
programme.desc: Audra Morrice journeys to the colourful island state of Sarawak, Malaysia where she indulges in a cultural feast for the senses via its rich gastronomy. Audra explores Malaysian roots through food, family and local culture.

programme.title: Field to Feast - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are countless varieties of chillies, but in this episode, we visit a farm producing a type of chilli that is cherished by Turkish Australians. Thanh then puts his taste beds to the test and tackles this spicy classic.

programme.title: ABC News Overnight - Episode 44
programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Common Cause - High Hopes - Nepal
programme.desc: When Australian Audette Exel applied her skills to support some of the world's poorest she helped transform lives including Angjuk Lama, a former yak herder who is now giving back by helping others in his Himalayan homeland.

programme.title: Compass - Labassa - If theseWalls Could Talk
programme.desc: Compass was given rare access to Labassa, the historic Renaissance mansion in Melbourne to film many of the remaining tenants. We focus on the post war years of Jewish refugees and 1970's bohemians, artists and performers.

programme.title: Expanse: The Nannup Four - The People In the Blue House
programme.desc: When three adults and a child disappear without a trace from the isolated bush community of Nannup in 2007, it sparks disturbing theories. What was happening in the little blue house? Presented by Dominique Bayens.

programme.title: I was actually there - Woomera Detention Centre Breakout
programme.desc: A demonstration against indefinite mandatory detention at Woomera detention centre attracted more than a thousand concerned citizens from all over the country. But the protest took an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 2
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: A Brief History of Cricket Down Under: The 80s - The Underarm Ball
programme.desc: February 1, 1981: Australia vs NZ at the MCG. With New Zealand's tail-end batsman needing 6 runs to win off a single ball, Australian skipper Greg Chappell made a decision that is still being talked about over 40 years later.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 16
programme.desc: Hosted by award-winning journalist Pip Courtney, Landline is Australia's only national agricultural television program covering stories from Australia's rural and regional heartland.

programme.title: Insiders - Episode 18
programme.desc: Start your Sunday morning with the show the politicians rely on to find out what's going on. David Speers presents Australia's must-watch political program, joined by a panel of the best political analysts and commentators.

programme.title: The Changeling (1980)
programme.desc: After the death of his wife and daughter in a car crash, a music professor staying at a long-vacant Seattle mansion is dragged into a decades-old mystery by an inexplicable presence in the mansion's attic.

programme.title: The Tourist
programme.desc: Revolves around Frank, an American tourist visiting Italy to mend a broken heart. Elise is an extraordinary woman who deliberately crosses his path.

programme.title: East Asia Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: Ten Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Amy gets bitten by a rabid bat during her last graveyard shift as a veteran punk rock disc jockey. When a storm traps Amy, her mysterious replacement and an anxious staff inside their small-town radio station, reality starts to distort as they go deeper into the graveyard shift…

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A struggling writer must write a hit novel to save his career. He retreats to his childhood home where his father, also a successful writer, died mysteriously. Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder happens, and the suspects get killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy over two generations.

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. Spotted and marked for death, they find every escape route sealed. To cover up his crime, the sheriff summons an armed militia to hunt them down—triggering a deadly chase with no way out.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: They Wait in the Dark
programme.desc: Amy and her adopted son Adrian flee from her abusive ex-girlfriend Judith. Seeking refuge in an abandoned farmhouse in Amy's Kansas hometown, they confront a supernatural evil force from her dark past that haunts Adrian. As Judith pursues them, Amy and Adrian must face the dangers both outside and within the house.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: Police are hard-pressed to find solid leads when a 19-year-old girl vanishes without a trace.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
